sections.paragraph:
Original: כּנעני

Transliteration: kena‛anı̂y

Phonetic: ken-ah-an-ee'

BDB Definition:

Canaanite = see Cana " zealous"
  1. descendant of inhabitant of Canaan (adjective)
  2. descendant or inhabitant of Canaan (noun)
  3. a merchant, trader (noun)

Origin: patrial from H3667

TWOT entry: 1002a,1002b

Part(s) of speech:
